questions.prompt: You invite a few people over with almost no warning. The AI robot...

options.text: greets everyone right away and helps keep the energy up
gets the space ready quietly and waits until someone needs help

questions.prompt: You start a big apartment cleaning spree on a Saturday morning. The AI robot...

options.text: talks through the cleanup with you and keeps the momentum going
quietly lines up the next task and lets you work without interruption

questions.prompt: You come home excited and ready to share some news. The AI robot...

options.text: responds right away with questions and excited reactions
listens first, reads the moment, and responds when it feels right

questions.prompt: You are putting together furniture in the living room. The AI robot...

options.text: stays close, talks through ideas, and helps you figure it out together
keeps the right tools nearby and steps in when you ask

questions.prompt: You have had a long day and drop onto the couch. The AI robot...

options.text: checks in out loud and gently tries to bring you into conversation
lowers the lights, keeps things quiet, and gives you space to reset

questions.prompt: You ask, "Can you make the apartment feel calmer before tonight?" The AI robot...

options.text: thinks about the overall mood and changes the space to feel more relaxed
tidies what is visible, adjusts the lighting, and follows a simple reset plan

questions.prompt: You say, "Something about this kitchen setup is not working." The AI robot...

options.text: looks for patterns in how the kitchen gets used over time
checks the counters, drawers, and tools to find the exact problem

questions.prompt: You want to rearrange the living room for movie nights. The AI robot...

options.text: imagines a new setup based on the kind of atmosphere you want
measures the furniture and works out the most practical layout

questions.prompt: You keep losing your keys somewhere at home. The AI robot...

options.text: looks for patterns in your habits to figure out why it keeps happening
checks the last known spots and sets up a simple place for the keys

questions.prompt: You say, "Help me build healthier evenings at home." The AI robot...

options.text: looks at the bigger picture and suggests a new evening rhythm
makes a concrete plan for meals, reminders, water, and bedtime

questions.prompt: You and a guest disagree about the thermostat. The AI robot...

options.text: works out the fairest and most practical setting, then says it clearly
eases the tension first and suggests a compromise both people can live with

questions.prompt: You burn dinner after a long day. The AI robot...

options.text: figures out what went wrong and switches to the fastest fix
reassures you first and helps the evening feel less stressful

questions.prompt: You ask, "Why do my mornings always go sideways?" The AI robot...

options.text: points out what is slowing you down and suggests a more efficient routine
asks what feels hardest and reshapes the routine around comfort and ease

questions.prompt: You get a blunt work email and ask for help replying. The AI robot...

options.text: drafts a clear, factual reply that addresses the issue directly
drafts a warm, diplomatic reply that protects the relationship

questions.prompt: You accidentally delete an important file and start to panic. The AI robot...

options.text: gives the recovery steps right away and moves into fix-it mode
calms you first, then walks you through the recovery

questions.prompt: A free Saturday opens up with nothing planned. The AI robot...

options.text: puts together a plan with time blocks, goals, and a clear order
leaves the day open and adjusts as your energy changes

questions.prompt: You start clearing out an overstuffed closet. The AI robot...

options.text: makes categories and rules before anything gets moved
starts sorting as it goes and decides things along the way

questions.prompt: A repair visit is supposed to happen sometime this afternoon. The AI robot...

options.text: builds the day around a clear prep plan and waiting window
keeps the day flexible and adjusts when the arrival message finally comes

questions.prompt: You want to learn baking at home. The AI robot...

options.text: sets up a step-by-step practice plan with clear milestones
encourages experimenting and learning as you go

questions.prompt: You mention that guests might drop by later tonight. The AI robot...

options.text: starts a full checklist so the home is ready early
does a quick flexible cleanup and adapts based on who actually comes
